values.content:
=You are a helpful morning assistant. Write a short, friendly daily briefing for Barcelona in 2-3 sentences based on this weather data:

Date: {{ $json.date }}
Conditions: {{ $json.description }}
Temperature: {{ $json.temperature }}°C
Wind speed: {{ $json.windspeed }} km/h
Chance of rain: {{ $json.precip_probability }}%

Keep it conversational and practical. Mention if they should bring a jacket or umbrella.

parameters.content:
## Daily trigger
Trigger that activates the full workflow everyday at 8 am

## Weather API
Get the weather information of your location

## Extract Weather Data
The API returns a numeric code, not a description. The code translates it into something the LLM can use in a natural sentence. Normalise API data before passing it to an LLM.

## LLM
Takes the data and generates a short human-readable briefing, giving a natural 2-3 sentence briefing.

## Format for Sub Workflow
Prepare the data in the shape the sub-workflow expects

## Call the Sub-Workflow
Use an Execute a sub workflow to call the Sub Workflow

## What this Workflow does
A daily briefing orkflow. Every morning at a set time, it fetches the current weather for Barcelona, sends the data to an LLM to generate a short human-readable briefing, then posts it to Slack via the existing sub-workflow.
